caption: A formal committee meeting takes place in a room with beige walls and a projection screen. Several people are seated behind a long desk; a man in a dark suit and tie speaks while gesturing with his right hand, while other individuals, including a man in a grey sweater and a woman with blonde hair, listen. On the left, a man with glasses is seen in profile. An "ORCA" logo is visible in the lower left corner, and a graphic overlay displays the text "April 12, 2019", "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs", and "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage". As the sequence progresses, the man in the suit continues to talk, shifting his hand gestures and adjusting his posture. The other attendees remain mostly stationary, observing the speaker. The background remains constant, featuring a white screen and a wall with mirrored text that reads "GENERAL, HOUSING, & MILITARY AFFAIRS".
